sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52147" key="kakogu/naios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-γύναιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing ills to women</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">228</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
